name: Sudoku Solver
description: Solve a 9×9 Sudoku puzzle using backtracking — try digits 1-9 in each empty cell and backtrack on conflict.
intuition: Find the first empty cell. Try placing digits 1–9 one at a time. Check if the digit is valid (not in the same row, column, or 3×3 box). If valid, place it and recurse. If no digit works, erase and backtrack.
